# Q²M INTERIORDETAILER

## Interior / maintenance

### Quick interior detailer with antibacterial action.

Q²M InteriorDetailer is a fast, convenient solution for everyday interior care. It works as a true quick detailer for interior surfaces, allowing you to wipe down dashboards, trim, and frequently touched areas in seconds, restoring a clean, fresh look.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/productmain_1700x1645px_q2m_interior-detailer_1000_500_2023-1024x991.png)

[Technical Details](#technical-details)

## Strong hygienic action while removing daily contaminants for a pure and clean surface.

Q²M InteriorDetailer combines quick interior cleaning with hygienic protection. Its alcohol-based formula removes light dirt, fingerprints, and fresh marks while eliminating up to 99% of bacteria and microbes. The product leaves a natural, residue-free finish, making it ideal for frequent use between deeper cleaning sessions.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons11.svg)

REMOVES 99% OF BACTERIA 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons33.svg)

LABORATORY TESTED DISINFECTANT 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons19.svg)

SUITABLE FOR ALL SURFACES 

what makes

Purify Q²M INTERIORDETAILER so special? 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/interiordetailer-4-1024x576.jpg)

Quick interior wipe-down for daily maintenance

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640q2minteriordeatiler.webp)

CAPACITIES 

500 ML / 1000 ML / 4000 ML

Consumption

80ml/car

## HOW TO USE
Q²M INTERIORDETAILER

01
Spray Q²M InteriorDetailer onto a microfiber towel. 

02
Wipe interior surfaces gently to clean and refresh. 

03
Focus on frequently touched areas such as the steering wheel and controls. 

04
Allow the surface to air dry. 

05
Use regularly for fast interior maintenance. 

### Watch
product
video

## FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

01
Is Q²M InteriorDetailer suitable for daily use? 

Yes, it is designed for quick, regular interior maintenance.

02
Does it disinfect surfaces? 

Yes, it eliminates up to 99% of bacteria and microbes.

03
Is it alcohol-based? 

Yes, it uses an alcohol-based formula.

04
Does it leave shine or residue? 

No, it leaves a natural, clean finish.

05
What surfaces can it be used on? 

Most hard interior surfaces, such as plastics, can also be used on LCD screens safely.

## Recommended Pairing

We recommend complementary products that perfectly match your current one, creating a complete and convenient KIT. Together, they deliver the best performance and a seamless user experience.
